description: Entry-point CLI contracts for the auditable-llm-eval pipeline

entries.name: eval/run_copilot_eval.py
entries.purpose: One-shot reproducible eval: run model on test_50, write outputs/verdicts/report/summary/config to runs/<run_id>/

outputs.outputs.jsonl: model outputs, one row per test item (id, output, error?, latency)
outputs.verdicts.jsonl: naive structural verdicts (non-empty + min-length guard). NOT authoritative — see summary.json for real score.
outputs.report.jsonl: scorer per-row result: exact_checks, soft_checks, unsupported_claims, missing_required_points, score, runtime_error
outputs.summary.json: aggregated: total, semantic_scored, runtime_errors, overall_reference_check_rate, by_task, items_with_unsupported_claims
outputs.config.yaml: pinned run config (model tag, dataset path, scorer path, temperature=0, seed, timestamp) — for re-running

entries.name: verify_copilot_run.py
entries.purpose: Discipline checker: re-run scorer from disk against a committed run, verify outputs/verdicts/summary/tamper-audit/config

args.help: path to a committed run (must contain outputs.jsonl, verdicts.jsonl, summary.json, config.yaml)
expected model tag (for tamper audit on config.yaml)

checks: outputs.jsonl exists & all rows have non-empty output text
scorer re-run reproduces summary.json (overall_reference_check_rate + by_task + runtime_errors)
tamper audit: report.jsonl rows contain checks matching dataset reference_checks (no silent check removal)
config.yaml matches expected model tag (no model swap)

entries.name: copilot/score_copilot_run_v2.py
entries.purpose: Authoritative scorer with 10 reference_check types (see specs/scoring-rules.json)

args.help: run 3-case internal self-test (no real repo needed)

dependency_policy: all three scripts depend ONLY on Python standard library (no pip install needed for eval pipeline)
